properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] Detección posible operacion maliciosa en Key Vault
properties.description: [SEGITTUR] Detección posible operación maliciosa en Key Vault
properties.query:
let operationlist = dynamic(
    ["VaultDelete", "KeyDelete", "SecretDelete", "SecretPurge", "KeyPurge", "SecretBackup", "KeyBackup", "SecretListDeleted", "CertificateCreate", "CertificatePurge"]);
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "VAULTS" and ResultType == "Success" 
| where OperationName in (operationlist)
| extend
    JoinIP = tostring(split(CallerIPAddress, ":")[0]),
    User = coalesce(identity_claim_unique_name_s, identity_claim_upn_s)
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkInfo
    | mv-expand IPAddresses
    | extend JoinIP = tostring(IPAddresses.IPAddress)
    | where isnotempty(JoinIP)
    | project JoinIP, DeviceName
) on JoinIP
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    OperationName,
    IpAddress=JoinIP,
    User,
    DeviceName,
    KeyVaultName = Resource,
    KeyVaultTarget = id_s,
    ResourceGroup,
    SubscriptionId

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] Detección posible operación maliciosa en {{KeyVaultName}}  por {{User}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] Detección posible operación maliciosa {{OperationName}} en {{KeyVaultName}}  por {{User}}

properties.displayName: [TEST][GEN] EF-O365-002-T1048 Massive data download from SharePoint/OneDrive
properties.description: Detects when a user performs a massive download of data from OneDrive and/or SharePoint, 1000 files in 10 minutes. Provides data on Country, Client IP, and all downloaded files.
properties.query:
let watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_User = (_GetWatchlist('watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_User') 
    | project SearchKey); 
let watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_SourceIP = (_GetWatchlist('watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_SourceIP')
    | project SearchKey); 
OfficeActivity 
| where OfficeWorkload in ("SharePoint", "OneDrive") 
| where Operation == "FileDownloaded" 
//| extend usuario = tostring(split(UserId,'@'))
// Se excepciona sincronizaciones mismo usuario
| extend user = replace_regex(UserId, "[.@]", "_")
| where Site_Url !has user
| where ClientIP !in (watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_SourceIP) 
| where UserId !in (watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_User) 
| extend location1=geo_info_from_ip_address(ClientIP)
| extend Country = tostring(parse_json(tostring(location1)).country)
| summarize dcount(OfficeObjectId) by UserId, OfficeWorkload, Site_Url 
| where dcount_OfficeObjectId > 500
| join kind=inner (OfficeActivity 
    | where OfficeWorkload in ("SharePoint", "OneDrive") 
    | where Operation == "FileDownloaded" 
    | where ClientIP !in (watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_SourceIP) 
    | where UserId !in (watchlist_EF_O365_002_T1048_User)
    | extend location1=geo_info_from_ip_address(ClientIP)
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(tostring(location1)).country)
    ) 
    on UserId 
| project 
    ActorUsername = UserId, 
    ActingAppName = OfficeWorkload, 
    TargetUrl = Site_Url, 
    Operation, 
    SrcIpAddr = ClientIP,
    SrcGeoCountry = Country,
    HttpUserAgent = UserAgent, 
    SrcFileName = SourceFileName, 
    EventCount = dcount_OfficeObjectId
| parse ActorUsername with * "urn:spo:" UserUPN
| extend User = iff(isempty(UserUPN), ActorUsername, UserUPN)
| project-away UserUPN
| summarize arg_max(TargetUrl,Operation,HttpUserAgent,SrcGeoCountry,EventCount),ListObject = make_set(SrcFileName) by ActorUsername, SrcIpAddr, ActingAppName

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST][GEN] EF-O365-002-T1048 Massive data download from SharePoint/OneDrive  {{ActorUsername}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Massive data download detected from {{ActorUsername}} from {{SrcGeoCountry}} with “{{EventCount}}” files downloaded in 10 minutes.

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] TIP - Conexion entrante aceptada WAF contra IP
properties.description: [SEGITTUR] TIP - Conexion entrante aceptada WAF contra IP
properties.query:
let ThreatIPs = ThreatIntelIndicators
| where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
| where IsDeleted == false;
//| where Confidence >= 20;
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s != "Block"
| where requestUri_s contains "pid.segittur"
| where isnotempty(clientIP_s)
| join kind=inner (
    ThreatIPs
) on $left.clientIP_s == $right.ObservableValue
| project TimeGenerated,
          clientIP_s,
          requestUri_s,
          action_s,
          ObservableValue,
          Confidence,
          ResourceType,
          Created,
          ValidUntil

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] TIP - Conexion entrante aceptada WAF contra IP {{clientIP_s}}

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-042 Anomalía detectada en ingesta
properties.description: Detecta ingesta incrementada o en decremento por tablas. Necesario ajustar valor de Percent (40 por defecto) y excepcionar tablas en watchlist que no queremos supervisar.

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-042 Anomalía detectada en ingesta {{Object}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Detecto "{{PercentageQty}}%" sobre el valor esperado "{{ExpectedQty}} " en la tabla {{Object}}.

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] CA-BAS-Login-001 Multiples Login fallidos
properties.description: Detección de fuerza bruta de un usuario
properties.query:
let threshold = 4; 
let timeRange = 2h;
MicrosoftAzureBastionAuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Network/BastionHost/disconnect"
| where Message == "Login Failed"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange) // Filtra por los eventos ocurridos en los últimos 10 minutos
| summarize Message=make_set(Message),startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by UserName,UserEmail,TargetVMIPAddress 
| where EventCount>=threshold

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] CA-BAS-Login-001 Multiples Login fallidos en {{TargetVMIPAddress}} con {{UserName}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat:
[SEGITTUR]CA-BAS-Login-001 Multiples Login fallidos en {{TargetVMIPAddress}} con {{UserName}}
Datos UserMail: {{UserEmail}}

properties.displayName: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to AzureActivity
properties.description: This query maps any IP indicators of compromise (IOCs) from threat intelligence (TI), by searching for matches in AzureActivity.
properties.query:
let dt_lookBack = 1h; // Look back 1 hour for AzureActivity logs
let ioc_lookBack = 14d; // Look back 14 days for threat intelligence indicators
// Fetch threat intelligence indicators related to IP addresses
let IP_Indicators = ThreatIntelIndicators
 //extract key part of kv pair
     | extend IndicatorType = replace(@"\[|\]|\""", "", tostring(split(ObservableKey, ":", 0)))
     | where IndicatorType in ("ipv4-addr", "ipv6-addr", "network-traffic")
     | extend NetworkSourceIP = toupper(ObservableValue)
     | extend TrafficLightProtocolLevel = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).TLPLevel)
  // Filter out indicators without relevant IP address fields
  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(ioc_lookBack)
  // Select the IP entity based on availability of different IP fields
  | extend TI_ipEntity = iff(isnotempty(NetworkSourceIP), NetworkSourceIP, NetworkSourceIP)
  | extend TI_ipEntity = iff(isempty(TI_ipEntity) and isnotempty(NetworkSourceIP), NetworkSourceIP, TI_ipEntity)
  | extend Url = iff(ObservableKey == "url:value", ObservableValue, "")
  // Exclude local addresses using the ipv4_is_private operator and filtering out specific address prefixes
  | where ipv4_is_private(TI_ipEntity) == false and  TI_ipEntity !startswith "fe80" and TI_ipEntity !startswith "::" and TI_ipEntity !startswith "127."
  | summarize LatestIndicatorTime = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Id, ObservableValue
  | where IsActive and (ValidUntil > now() or isempty(ValidUntil));
// Perform a join between IP indicators and AzureActivity logs to identify potential malicious activity
IP_Indicators
   | project-reorder *, Tags, TrafficLightProtocolLevel, NetworkSourceIP, Type, TI_ipEntity
// using innerunique to keep perf fast and result set low, we only need one match to indicate potential malicious activity that needs to be investigated
| join kind=innerunique (
    AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated >= ago(dt_lookBack)
    // renaming time column so it is clear the log this came from
    | extend AzureActivity_TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated
)
on $left.TI_ipEntity == $right.CallerIpAddress
| where AzureActivity_TimeGenerated < ValidUntil
| summarize AzureActivity_TimeGenerated = arg_max(AzureActivity_TimeGenerated, *) by Id, CallerIpAddress
| extend Description = tostring(parse_json(Data).description)
| extend ActivityGroupNames = extract(@"ActivityGroup:(\S+)", 1, tostring(parse_json(Data).labels))
| project AzureActivity_TimeGenerated, Description, ActivityGroupNames, Id, ValidUntil, Confidence, TI_ipEntity, CallerIpAddress, 
Caller, OperationNameValue, ActivityStatusValue, CategoryValue, ResourceId, NetworkSourceIP, Type, Url
| extend timestamp = AzureActivity_TimeGenerated
| extend Name = iif(Caller has '@', tostring(split(Caller,'@',0)[0]), "")
| extend UPNSuffix = iif(Caller has '@', tostring(split(Caller,'@',1)[0]), "")
| extend AadUserId = iif(Caller !has '@', tostring(Caller), "")

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to AzureActivity
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to AzureActivity

properties.displayName: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to SigninLogs
properties.description: This query maps any IP indicators of compromise (IOCs) from threat intelligence (TI), by searching for matches in SigninLogs.
properties.query:
let dt_lookBack = 1h;
let ioc_lookBack = 14d;
let Signins = materialize(union isfuzzy=true
  (SigninLogs
  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(dt_lookBack)),
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(dt_lookBack)
  | extend Status = todynamic(Status), LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails)));
let SigninIPs = Signins | summarize make_list(IPAddress);
let TI = materialize(ThreatIntelIndicators
//extract key part of kv pair
     | extend IndicatorType = replace(@"\[|\]|\""", "", tostring(split(ObservableKey, ":", 0)))
     | where IndicatorType in ("ipv4-addr", "ipv6-addr", "network-traffic")
     | extend NetworkSourceIP = toupper(ObservableValue)
     | extend TrafficLightProtocolLevel = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).TLPLevel)
  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(ioc_lookBack)
  | extend TI_ipEntity = NetworkSourceIP
  | extend Url = iff(ObservableKey == "url:value", ObservableValue, "")
  | where TI_ipEntity in (SigninIPs)
  | summarize LatestIndicatorTime = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Id, ObservableValue
  | extend Description = tostring(parse_json(Data).description)
  | where IsActive and (ValidUntil > now() or isempty(ValidUntil))
  | where Description !contains_cs "State: inactive;" and Description !contains_cs "State: falsepos;");
TI
   | project-reorder *, Tags, TrafficLightProtocolLevel, NetworkSourceIP, Type, TI_ipEntity
// using innerunique to keep perf fast and result set low, we only need one match to indicate potential malicious activity that needs to be investigated
| join kind=innerunique (Signins) on $left.TI_ipEntity == $right.IPAddress
| project-rename SigninLogs_TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated
| where SigninLogs_TimeGenerated < ValidUntil
| extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.errorCode), StatusDetails = tostring(Status.additionalDetails), StatusReason = tostring(Status.failureReason)
| summarize SigninLogs_TimeGenerated = arg_max(SigninLogs_TimeGenerated, *) by Id, IPAddress
| extend Description = tostring(parse_json(Data).description)
| extend ActivityGroupNames = extract(@"ActivityGroup:(\S+)", 1, tostring(parse_json(Data).labels))
| project SigninLogs_TimeGenerated, Description, ActivityGroupNames, Id, ValidUntil, Confidence, TI_ipEntity, IPAddress, UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, StatusCode, StatusDetails, StatusReason, NetworkSourceIP, Type, Url
| extend timestamp = SigninLogs_TimeGenerated, Name = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, '@', 0)[0]), UPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, '@', 1)[0])

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to SigninLogs
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [TEST]TI Map IP Entity to SigninLogs

properties.displayName: [TEST] WAF-001-T1594 Elevado número de peticiones  desde el mismo origen
properties.query:
let Umbral = 1000;
AzureDiagnostics
| where httpMethod_s == "GET"
| summarize Peticiones = count() by socketIp_s, requestUri_s
| where Peticiones > Umbral

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST] WAF-001-T1594 Elevado número de peticiones  desde el mismo origen {{socketIp_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [TEST] WAF-001-T1594 Elevado número de peticiones  desde el mismo origen {{socketIp_s}}

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] Alerta Defender for Cloud
properties.description: [SEGITTUR] Alerta Defender for Cloud
properties.query:
SecurityAlert
| where ProductName == "Azure Security Center"
| extend Principal_IP_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Principal IP"])
| extend Malicious_URL_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Malicious URL"])
| where Malicious_URL_ !contains "example.com"
| summarize
    Message=make_set(ProviderName),
    startTime=min(TimeGenerated),
    endTime=max(TimeGenerated),
    EventCount = count()
    by AlertName, Principal_IP_

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] Alerta Defender for Cloud {{AlertName}} desde {{Principal_IP_}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] Alerta Defender for Cloud {{AlertName}} desde {{Principal_IP_}}

properties.displayName: [TEST] PE-AD-002-T1078.003 Usuario añadido a Azure Active Directory Privileged Roles
properties.description:
This will alert when a user is added to any of the Privileged Groups.
For further information on AuditLogs please see https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/reports-monitoring/reference-audit-activities.
For Administrator role permissions in Microsoft Entra ID please see https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/users-groups-roles/directory-assign-admin-roles
properties.query:
let OperationList = dynamic(["Add member to role","Add member to role in PIM requested (permanent)"]);
let PrivilegedGroups = dynamic(["UserAccountAdmins","PrivilegedRoleAdmins","TenantAdmins"]);
AuditLogs
//| where LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"
| where Category =~ "RoleManagement"
| where OperationName in~ (OperationList)
| mv-apply TargetResource = TargetResources on 
  (
      where TargetResource.type =~ "User"
      | extend TargetUserPrincipalName = tostring(TargetResource.userPrincipalName),
               modProps = TargetResource.modifiedProperties
  )
| mv-apply Property = modProps on 
  (
      where Property.displayName =~ "Role.WellKnownObjectName"
      | extend DisplayName = trim('"',tostring(Property.displayName)),
               GroupName = trim('"',tostring(Property.newValue))
  )
| extend InitiatingAppId = InitiatedBy.app.appId
| extend InitiatingAppName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
| extend InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingUserPrincipalName = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatingAadUserId = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend InitiatingIpAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress, InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress))
| extend InitiatingUserRoles = InitiatedBy.user.roles
| where GroupName in~ (PrivilegedGroups)
// If you don't want to alert for operations from PIM, remove below filtering for MS-PIM.
| where InitiatingAppName != "MS-PIM"
| project TimeGenerated, AADOperationType, Category, OperationName, AADTenantId, InitiatingUserPrincipalName, InitiatingAadUserId, InitiatingAppId, InitiatingAppName, InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName, InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId, InitiatingIpAddress, DisplayName, GroupName, InitiatingUserRoles, TargetUserPrincipalName
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName,'@',0)[0]), AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(InitiatingUserPrincipalName,'@',1)[0])
| extend TargetName = tostring(split(TargetUserPrincipalName,'@',0)[0]), TargetUPNSuffix = tostring(split(TargetUserPrincipalName,'@',1)[0])
| project TimeGenerated, ActorUsername = AccountName, SrcFQDN = AccountUPNSuffix, ObjectType = Category, EventMessage = DisplayName, GroupName, ActingAppId = InitiatingAppId, ActingAppName = InitiatingAppName, SrcIpAddr = InitiatingIpAddress, SrcAppName = InitiatingAppServicePrincipalName, SrcUsername = InitiatingUserPrincipalName, TargetAppName = TargetName, DstUsername = TargetUserPrincipalName, TargetFQDN = TargetUPNSuffix, ActorUserId = InitiatingAadUserId, TargetAppId = InitiatingAppServicePrincipalId

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST] PE-AD-002-T1078.003 Usuario añadido a Azure Active Directory Privileged Roles {{TargetAppName}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se ha detectado que el usuario "{{TargetAppName}} " ha sido añadido a un role privilegiado por "{{ActorUsername}}.

properties.displayName: [TEST] CA-AD-084-T1110 Ataque de fuerza bruta contra PC en la nube
properties.description: Identifica evidencia de actividad de fuerza bruta contra una PC en la nube con Windows 365 al resaltar múltiples fallas de autenticación y mediante una autenticación exitosa dentro de un período de tiempo determinado.
properties.query:
let authenticationWindow = 20m;
let sensitivity = 2.5;
SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName =~ "Windows Sign In"
| extend FailureOrSuccess = iff(ResultType in ("0", "50125", "50140", "70043", "70044"), "Success", "Failure")
| summarize FailureCount = countif(FailureOrSuccess=="Failure"), SuccessCount = countif(FailureOrSuccess=="Success"), IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress,1000)
                          by bin(TimeGenerated, authenticationWindow), UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName
| extend FailureSuccessDiff = FailureCount - SuccessCount
| where FailureSuccessDiff > 0
| summarize Diff = make_list(FailureSuccessDiff, 10000), TimeStamp = make_list(TimeGenerated, 10000) by UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName//, tostring(IPAddresses)
| extend (Anomalies, Score, Baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(Diff, sensitivity, -1, 'linefit')  
| mv-expand Diff to typeof(double), TimeStamp to typeof(datetime), Anomalies to typeof(double), Score to typeof(double), Baseline to typeof(long)
| where Anomalies > 0
| summarize by UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, Anomalies, Score, Baseline, FailureToSuccessDiff = Diff
| join kind=leftouter (
      SigninLogs
      | where AppDisplayName =~ "Windows Sign In"
      | extend OS = DeviceDetail.operatingSystem, Browser = DeviceDetail.browser
      | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.errorCode), StatusDetails = tostring(Status.additionalDetails)
      | extend State = tostring(LocationDetails.state), City = tostring(LocationDetails.city)
      | summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), 
                  EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), 
                  IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress,100), 
                  OS = make_set(OS,20), 
                  Browser = make_set(Browser,20), 
                  City = make_set(City,100), 
                  ResultType = make_set(ResultType,100)
              by UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, UserId, AppDisplayName
  ) on UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName
| project-away UserDisplayName1, UserPrincipalName1
| extend IPAddressFirst = tostring(IPAddresses[0])
| extend Name = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName,'@',0)[0]), UPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName,'@',1)[0])
| project EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, SrcIpAddr = IPAddressFirst, ActorUsername = UserPrincipalName, ActorUserId = UserId, EventType = Anomalies, Operation = ResultType

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST] CA-AD-084-T1110 Ataque de fuerza bruta contra PC en la nube desde {{SrcIpAddr}}.
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detecta ataque de fuerza bruta desde {{SrcIpAddr}} con el usuario {{ActorUsername}}.

properties.displayName: [TEST] PR-CLD-031-T1078.004 Miembro eliminado de grupo sensible
properties.description: Detecta miembro eliminado de un grupo sensible definido en watchlist.
properties.query:
let watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group = (_GetWatchlist("watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group") | project SearchKey);
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Remove member from group"
| extend GroupName = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[1].oldValue)
| where GroupName in~ (watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group) // Grupos sensibles, modificar whatchlist
| extend RemovedUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend RemovedUserId = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[0].oldValue)
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| project TimeGenerated, TargetUsername = RemovedUser, TargetUserScopeId = RemovedUserId, GroupName, ActorUsername

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST] PR-CLD-031-T1078.004 Miembro eliminado de grupo sensible por {{ActorUsername}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detecta la eliminación de {{TargetUsername}} por {{ActorUsername}} del grupo {{GroupName}}.

properties.displayName: [TEST] PR-CLD-032-T1078.004 Miembro añadido a grupo sensible
properties.description: Detecta miembro añadido a un grupo sensible definido en watchlist.
properties.query:
let watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group = (_GetWatchlist("watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group") | project SearchKey);
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Add member to group"
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| extend GroupName = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[1].newValue)
| where GroupName in~ (watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group) // Grupos sensibles, modificar whatchlist
| extend AddUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend AddUserId = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[0].newValue)
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| project TimeGenerated, TargetUsername = AddUser, TargetUserScopeId = AddUserId, GroupName, ActorUsername

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST]PR-CLD-032-T1078.004 Miembro añadido a grupo sensible por {{ActorUsername}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detecta {{TargetUsername}} añadido por {{ActorUsername}} en el grupo {{GroupName}}.

properties.displayName: [TEST]IA-AD-00X-T1078 Detect Disabled Account Sign-in Attempts by IP Address
properties.description: This use case searches for failed sign-in attempts to disabled accounts summarized by the IP originating IP address.
properties.query:
SigninLogs 
  | where ResultType == "50057" 
  | where ResultDescription =~ "User account is disabled. The account has been disabled by an administrator." 
  | summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), numberAccountsTargeted = dcount(UserPrincipalName), 
  numberApplicationsTargeted = dcount(AppDisplayName), accountSet = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 100), applicationSet=make_set(AppDisplayName, 100), 
  numberLoginAttempts = count() by IPAddress
  | extend timestamp = StartTime
  | order by numberLoginAttempts desc
  | extend IP_0_Address = IPAddress

properties.displayName: [TEST]PR-CLD-019-T1136.003 Guest account added to Azure AD
properties.description: La consulta de ejemplo siguiente crea una alerta si se agrega un usuario invitado a Azure AD. En algunos entornos esto podría y debería desencadenar una alerta, en otros entornos esto sucede continuamente y no debe usarse (para reducir el ruido).
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Add user" and Identity == "Microsoft B2B Admin Worker"
| project
User = TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[5].newValue,
Adm = InitiatedBy['user'].userPrincipalName,
IPOrigen = InitiatedBy['user'].ipAddress
| where Adm != "luis.coca@mn8energy.com"
| where Adm != "jaime.moreno.ext@mn8energy.com"
| where Adm != "jaime.garcia.ext@mn8energy.com"
| where Adm != "carlosandres.bejarano.ext@mn8energy.com"

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST]PR-CLD-019-T1136.003 Guest account added to Azure AD {{User}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Guest account added in Azure AD of user {{User}} by {{Adm}} from IP{{IPOrigen}} is detected.

properties.displayName: [TEST] SigIn in Risk in AAD
properties.description: Monitorización de los inicios de sesión en riesgo en AAD.
properties.query:
AADUserRiskEvents
| where OperationName == "User Risk Detection"
| where RiskLevel != "low"
| where Activity == "signin"
| where RiskState == "atRisk"
| project TimeGenerated, UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, RiskState, Activity, IpAddress, Location, DetectionTimingType, RiskEventType

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST] SigIn in Risk in AAD

properties.displayName: Create incidents based on Microsoft Defender for Endpoint alerts
properties.description: Create incidents based on all alerts generated in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

properties.displayName: [TEST][SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-005 Trafico denegado
properties.description: Detección de trafico denegado en waf por reglas
properties.query:
let timeRange = 10m;
let watchlist_DS_WAF_005 = _GetWatchlist("watchlist_DS_WAF_005");
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| where ruleName_s !in (watchlist_DS_WAF_005)
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s == "Block"
| where isnotempty( clientIP_s)
|summarize by clientIP_s,requestUri_s, ruleName_s

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST][SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-005 Trafico denegado {{ruleName_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [TEST]DS-WAF-005 Trafico denegado {{ruleName_s}}   desde IP {{clientIP_s}}

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-011 Intento de explotación de la vulnerabilidad Log4j
properties.description: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-011 Intento de explotación de la vulnerabilidad Log4j en Azure WAF
properties.query:
let log4jioc = dynamic(["jndi","ldap","${::"]);
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
  | extend matchVariableName_ = tostring(parse_json(details_matches_s)[0].matchVariableName)
  | where requestUri_s has_any (log4jioc) or details_data_s has_any (log4jioc)
  | extend matchVariableValue_ = tostring(parse_json(details_matches_s)[0].matchVariableValue)
  | project TimeGenerated, matchVariableValue_, requestUri_s, action_s, ruleName_s, OperationName, SubscriptionId 
  | extend timestamp = TimeGenerated

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-011 Intento de explotación de la vulnerabilidad Log4j desde {{matchVariableValue_}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-011 Intento de explotación de la vulnerabilidad Log4j desde {{matchVariableValue_}}

properties.displayName: Create incidents based on Microsoft Defender for Cloud
properties.description: Create incidents based on all alerts generated in Microsoft Defender for Cloud

properties.displayName: [TEST][SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-005 Trafico permitido
properties.description: Detección de trafico permitido en waf por reglas
properties.query:
let timeRange = 10m;
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s == "Allow"
| where isnotempty(clientIP_s)
| where policyMode_s <> "prevention"
| summarize by clientIP_s, requestUri_s, ruleName_s

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [TEST][SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-005 Trafico permitido {{ruleName_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [TEST]DS-WAF-005 Trafico permitido política {{ruleName_s}}  desde IP {{clientIP_s}}

| summarize startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIp_s,ThreatDescription_s, Action_s

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] CC-FW-003-T1071 Comunicación aceptada entrante desde IP maliciosa {{SourceIP}}

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-002-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 500
properties.description: Deteccion multiples errores 500,502,503,504
properties.query:
let threshold = 30; 
let timeRange = 10m;
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where httpStatusCode_d in (500,502,503,504)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| summarize Message=make_set(Message),startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by httpStatusCode_d,clientIp_s,OperationName,probeUrl_s 
| where EventCount>=threshold

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-002-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 500 {{clientIp_s}}  {{probeUrl_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-002-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 500 {{clientIp_s}}   {{probeUrl_s}}

properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-001-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 400
properties.description: Deteccion multiples errores 400,401,403,404,405,408
properties.query:
let threshold = 30; 
let timeRange = 10m;
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where httpStatusCode_d in (400,401,403,404,405,408)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| summarize Message=make_set(Message),startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by httpStatusCode_d,clientIp_s,OperationName,probeUrl_s 
| where EventCount>=threshold

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-001-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 400 {{clientIp_s}}  {{probeUrl_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] DS-WAF-001-T1083 Detectados multiples errores 400 {{clientIp_s}}  {{probeUrl_s}}

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN][MDATP] EX-AV-050-1204.002 Incidente CRÍTICO
properties.description: Se detecta un evento de criticidad crítica en un host.
properties.query:
//Modifica nombre de la alerta, por la alerta a excluir
let watchlist_EX_AV_050_RuleException = _GetWatchlist('watchlist_EX_AV_050_RuleException') | project SearchKey;
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
| where AlertSeverity == 'High'
| where Status == 'New'
| where AlertName !in (watchlist_EX_AV_050_RuleException)
| summarize count() by CompromisedEntity
| where count_ >= 1
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
    | where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
    | where AlertSeverity == 'High'
    | where Status == 'New')
    on CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project TimeGenerated, EventCount = count_, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: EX-AV-050-1204.002 Incidente CRÍTICO en {{DvcHostname}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detectan alertas de {{ThreatName}} en el equipo {{DvcHostname}}.

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN][MDATP] EX-AV-001-T1204.002 - Varios avisos de malware en 2 horas mismo host
properties.description: Se detectan varios hash para un mismo host en una ventana de tiempo de 2 horas
properties.query:
let timeRange = 2h;
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == "MDATP"
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(timeRange)
| extend MicrosoftDefenderAtp_Category_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["MicrosoftDefenderAtp.Category"])
| where MicrosoftDefenderAtp_Category_ == "Malware" or AlertName contains "malware"
| where Status != "Resolved"
| where CompromisedEntity != ""
| where AlertSeverity != "Low"
| extend hsh = extract('"Algorithm":"SHA256","Value":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
| extend algor = extract('"Algorithm":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
| extend directory = extract('"Directory":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
| extend name = extract('"Name":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
| summarize cuentaHost = count() by CompromisedEntity, AlertName, SourceComputerId
| where cuentaHost >= 2
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
    | where ProviderName == "MDATP"
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(timeRange)
    | where AlertSeverity != "Low"
    | extend hsh = extract('"Algorithm":"SHA256","Value":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
    | extend algor = extract('"Algorithm":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
    | extend directory = extract('"Directory":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
    | extend name = extract('"Name":"([^"]*)"',1,Entities)
    | extend MicrosoftDefenderAtp_Category_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["MicrosoftDefenderAtp.Category"])
    | where MicrosoftDefenderAtp_Category_ == "Malware" or AlertName contains "malware"
    | where Status != "Resolved"
    | where CompromisedEntity != "")
    on CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    DvcHostname=CompromisedEntity,
    ThreatName=AlertName,
    Entities,
    EventSeverity=AlertSeverity,
    EventMessage=Description,
    EventProduct=ProviderName,
    FileSHA256=hsh,
    HashType=algor,
    ThreatFilePath=directory,
    SrcFileName=name,
    EventStartTime=StartTime,
    EventEndTime=EndTime,
    RemediationSteps,
    ExtendedProperties,
    EventReportUrl=AlertLink,
    DvcAction=Status

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: EX-AV-001-T1204.002 - Varios avisos de malware en 2 horas mismo host {{DvcHostname}}

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN][MDATP] EX-AV-052-1204.002 Incidente múltiple de criticidad MEDIA
properties.description: Se detectan varios eventos de criticidad media en un host en 1 hora.
properties.query:
//Modifica nombre de la alerta, por la alerta a excluir
let watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException = _GetWatchlist('watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException') | project SearchKey;
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
| where AlertSeverity == 'Medium'
| where Status == 'New'
| where AlertName !in (watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException)
| summarize count() by CompromisedEntity
| where count_ >= 4
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
    | where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
    | where AlertSeverity == 'Medium'
    | where Status == 'New')
    on CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project TimeGenerated, EventCount = count_, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: EX-AV-052-1204.002 Incidente múltiple de criticidad MEDIA en {{DvcHostname}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detectan varias alertas de {{ThreatName}} en el equipo {{DvcHostname}} .

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN][MDATP] EX-AV-003-T1204.002 Mismo malware en varias estaciones
properties.description: Se detecta el mismo hash en 5 o más equipos diferentes, en una ventana de tiempo de 2 horas
properties.query:
let timeRange = 2h;
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(timeRange)
| where ProviderName == "MDATP"
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| where Status == "New"
//| where AlertSeverity != "Informational"
| where parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["MicrosoftDefenderAtp.Category"] == "Malware"
| extend FilePath_ = iff(
                         isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Directory))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].Directory))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Directory)))
                     )
| extend FileName_ = iff(
                         isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].Name))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)))
                     )
| extend Hash_ = iff(
                     isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].FileHashes))[0].Value),
                     tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].FileHashes))[0].Value),
                     tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].FileHashes))[0].Value)
                 )
| where isnotempty(Hash_)
| summarize countHash_ = dcount(CompromisedEntity) by Hash_
| where countHash_ >= 5
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(timeRange)
    | where ProviderName == "MDATP"
    | where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
    | where Status == "New"
    //                    | where AlertSeverity != "Informational"
    | where parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["MicrosoftDefenderAtp.Category"] == "Malware"
    | extend Hash_ = iff(
                     isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].FileHashes))[0].Value),
                     tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].FileHashes))[0].Value),
                     tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].FileHashes))[0].Value)
                 )
    | extend FileName_ = iff(
                         isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].Name))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)))
                     )
    | extend FilePath_ = iff(
                         isnull(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Directory))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].Directory))),
                         tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Directory)))
                     )
    | where isnotempty(Hash_)
    )
    on Hash_
    //| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    ThreatName=AlertName,
    DvcHostname=CompromisedEntity,
    FileSHA256=Hash_,
    SrcFileName=FileName_,
    ThreatFilePath=FilePath_,
    EventMessage=Description,
    EventReportUrl=AlertLink,
    EventSeverity=AlertSeverity,
    Techniques

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: EX-AV-003-T1204.002 Mismo malware en varias estaciones {{SrcFileName}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se ha detectado mismo malware con el nombre "{{SrcFileName}}" en las entidades "{{DvcHostname}}".

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN][MDATP] EX-AV-028-T1204.002 Varias máquinas infectadas con el mismo usuario
properties.description: Se detectan varias alertas con el mismo usuario. Configurado para MDATP.
properties.query:
//Excluir alerta en watchlist
let watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204_Alert = (_GetWatchlist('watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204.002_Alert') 
    | project SearchKey);
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
| where Status == 'New'
| where AlertName !in (watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204_Alert)
| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
| extend Entitiesparser = parse_json(Entities)
| extend Account = iff(Entitiesparser.Type == "account", Entitiesparser.Name, "")
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| where isnotempty(Account)
| summarize by tostring(CompromisedEntity), Account
| summarize count(), make_set(CompromisedEntity) by Account
| where count_ >= 4
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
	| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
	| where Status == 'New'
	| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
	| extend Entitiesparser = parse_json(Entities)
	| extend Account = iff(Entitiesparser.Type == "account", Entitiesparser.Name, "")
	| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
	| where isnotempty(Account)
	| extend Account = tostring(Account))
	on Account
| project-away count_, set_CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project TimeGenerated, ActorUsername = Account, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: EX-AV-028-T1204.002 Varias máquinas infectadas con el mismo usuario {{ActorUsername}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detectan varias alertas de {{ThreatName}} en el equipo {{DvcHostname}}.

//Modifica nombre de la alerta, por la alerta a excluir

| project TimeGenerated, EventCount = count_, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-004-2 Limite de ingesta diaria superada
properties.description: Se detecta que el límite diario ha sido sobrepasado por la alerta configurada en LogAnalytics
properties.query:
Operation
| where Detail has 'OverQuota'
| project TimeGenerated, Operation = OperationStatus, EventType = Detail, EventSubType = OperationKey, Object = OperationCategory

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-004-2 Limite de ingesta diaria superada
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detecta que el límite de ingesta configurado en el daily cap ha sido superado.

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-004 Superada la ingesta de GB diarios
properties.description: Detectado ingesta de más de un umbral GB en las ultimas 24h, esto debe indicarse en watchlist: watchlist__AS_STNL_004_overquota, indicando un valor inferior al dailycap configurado en Log Analytics.
properties.query:
let watchlist_AS_STNL_004_overquota = toscalar(_GetWatchlist("watchlist__AS_STNL_004_overquota") | project SearchKey);
Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalVolumeGB = sum(Quantity) / 1024
| where TotalVolumeGB > toint(watchlist_AS_STNL_004_overquota)
| project-rename SrcBytesGB = TotalVolumeGB

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-004 Superada la ingesta de {{SrcBytesGB}}  GB diarios
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se sobrepasa el límite de {{SrcBytesGB}} configurados.

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-003 Detectado conectores sin estado success en las últimas 12 horas
properties.description: Detecta si algun conector ha fallado en las ultimas 12 horas
properties.query:
let lastestStatus = SentinelHealth
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| where OperationName == 'Data fetch status change'
| where Status in ('Success', 'Failure')
| parse SentinelResourceId with * '/dataConnectors/' Friendly_name
| project TimeGenerated, SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId, Friendly_name, LastStatus = Status
| summarize TimeGenerated = arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId, Friendly_name;
let nextToLastestStatus = SentinelHealth
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| where OperationName == 'Data fetch status change'
| where Status in ('Success', 'Failure')
| parse SentinelResourceId with * '/dataConnectors/' Friendly_name
| join kind = leftanti (lastestStatus) on SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId, TimeGenerated
| project TimeGenerated, SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId, Friendly_name, NextToLastStatus = Status
| summarize TimeGenerated = arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId, Friendly_name;
lastestStatus
| join kind=inner (nextToLastestStatus) on SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceId
| where NextToLastStatus == 'Success' and LastStatus == 'Failure'
| project TimeGenerated, Object = Friendly_name, ObjectType = SentinelResourceId, EventEndTime = NextToLastStatus

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-003 Detectado conectores sin estado success en las ultimas 12 horas
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se detecta el conector {{Object}}  con status {{EventEndTime}}  con {{ObjectType}}.

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-039 Fallo de ejecución de regla NTR
properties.description: Detecta fallos a la hora de ejecutar reglas del tipo NTR.
properties.query:
SentinelHealth
| where OperationName == "NRT analytics rule run"
| where Status == "Failure"
| project TimeGenerated, Object = SentinelResourceName, EventResult = Status, EventMessage = Description

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-039 Fallo de ejecución de regla NTR {{Object}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se ha detectado error de ejecución de la regla {{Object}}.

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-040 Detectado secret expirado en integración XSOAR
properties.description: Busca secret expirado en el Service Principal de la integración usada por XSOAR, no genera incidente en la plataforma de TTECH, ya que la integración con nuestro entorno usa esta plataforma.
properties.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
//Modificar para CDU personalizados, donde el nombre no se puede modificar
| where ServicePrincipalName == "app-pid-pre-spn-xsoar-001"
| summarize
    ['All Error Codes']=make_set(ResultType),
    ['Successful IP Addresses']=make_set_if(IPAddress, ResultType == 0),
    ['Failed IP Addresses']=make_set_if(IPAddress, ResultType == "7000222")
    by ServicePrincipalId, ServicePrincipalName
| where ['All Error Codes'] has_all ("0", "7000222")
| project TargetAppId = ServicePrincipalId, TargetAppName = ServicePrincipalName, EventResult = ['All Error Codes'], EventFailedIp = ['Failed IP Addresses'], EventSuccessIp = ['Successful IP Addresses']

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-040 Detectado secret expirado en integración XSOAR en {{TargetAppName}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se ha detectado secret expirado en {{TargetAppName}}. Fallos desde "{{EventFailedIp}}".

properties.displayName: [GEN][MIN] AS-SNTL-038 Fallo de ejecución de regla programada
properties.description: Detecta fallos a la hora de ejecutar reglas del tipo scheduled.
properties.query:
let failures=SentinelHealth
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where OperationName == "Scheduled analytics rule run"
| where Status == "Failure"
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Object = SentinelResourceName,
    EventResult = Status,
    EventMessage = Description
| summarize FirstFailure = min(TimeGenerated), LastFailure = max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by Object //, EventResults = make_set(EventResult), EventMessages = make_set(EventMessage) by Object
| where EventCount >= 2
| project-away EventCount;
let tmp = SentinelHealth
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where OperationName == "Scheduled analytics rule run"
| where Status == "Success"
| project
    SuccessTime = TimeGenerated,
    Object = SentinelResourceName
| join kind=inner (failures) on Object
| where SuccessTime between (FirstFailure .. LastFailure)
| project-away Object1;
SentinelHealth
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where OperationName == "Scheduled analytics rule run"
| where Status == "Failure"
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Object = SentinelResourceName,
    EventResult = Status,
    EventMessage = Description
| summarize FirstFailure = min(TimeGenerated), LastFailure = max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count(), EventResults = make_set(EventResult), EventMessages = make_set(EventMessage) by Object
| where EventCount >= 2
| join kind=leftanti (tmp) on Object, FirstFailure, LastFailure

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-038 Fallo de ejecución de regla programada en {{Object}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Se ha detectado fallo de ejecución de la regla "{{Object}}".

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: AS-SNTL-041 Regla programada modificada o eliminada por {{ActorUsername}}

properties.description: CC-FW-033-T1071 Conexión bloqueada saliente contra IP maliciosa
properties.query:

| where Action_s != "Alert"
| summarize startTime=min(TimeGenerated), endTime=max(TimeGenerated), EventCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIp_s, ThreatDescription_s, Action_s

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: [SEGITTUR] CC-FW-033-T1071 Conexión bloqueada saliente contra IP maliciosa {{DestinationIp_s}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: [SEGITTUR] CC-FW-033-T1071 Conexión bloqueada saliente contra IP maliciosa hacia {{DestinationIp_s}}  desde {{SourceIP}}
